name: Blackpool Wyre & Fylde Inter Club
startAddress: Stanley Park, West Park Drive, Blackpool, FY3 9HU
parking: Blackpool Sports Centre, West Park Drive, Blackpool, FY3 9HQ
postRaceVenue: Blackpool Cricket Club, West Park Drive, Blackpool, FY3 9EQ

name: Lytham St Annes Inter Club
location: St Annes Sea Front, Lytham St Annes
startAddress: The Island, St Annes, South Promenade, Lytham St Annes, FY8 1LS
parking: Limited parking is available at the car park behind The Island Cinema. Runners are requested to car share as much as possible and to arrive early, allowing enough time to get to the race start. If you park on the surrounding streets, please be considerate to local homes and businesses.
routeDescription: The course is mainly within the park and 4 miles in total, 2 laps.
postRaceVenue: Fylde Rugby Club, Blackpool Road, Lytham St Annes, FY8 4EL

name: Preston Harriers Inter Club
startAddress: Miller Park, South Meadow Lane, Preston, PR1 8JP
parking:
Limited parking will be available at the Preston Sports Club (PSC). The BAE/EE car park on South Meadow Lane is not available. Limited parking is available at the Avenham Park car park (opposite the Continental) but much of South Meadow Lane leading to the Avenham Park car park, now has double yellow lines.

You may wish to consider parking around Winckley Square and accessing the park from there.

Runners are requested to car share as much as possible and to arrive early, allowing enough time to get to the race start.

If you park on the surrounding streets, please be considerate to local homes and businesses.
routeDescription:
The start and finish will be on Derby Walk in Miller Park, on the path above the fountain.

The race route is on tarmac paths in both Miller and Avenham parks and surrounding paths used previously, but incorporating the new tram bridge. We do not have exclusive use of the route, so please be considerate of others whilst running. There will be plenty of race marshals along the route to provide both direction and encouragement.
postRaceVenue: Preston Sports Club, West Cliff Ground, South Meadow Lane, Preston, PR1 8JP

name: Thornton Cleveleys Inter Club
startAddress: Queens Promenade, Norbreck, Blackpool, FY5 1PU (opposite the Norbreck Castle Hotel)
parking: There is plenty of free parking along the Queens promenade and surrounding roads.
postRaceVenue: Tee Time Golf Centre, Fleetwood Road, Thornton-Cleveleys, FY5 1RN

name: Wesham Inter Club
startAddress: BNFL Salwick, Lea Lane, Lea Town, Preston, PR4 0RP
parking: Available at the BNFL Salwick Club car park, PR4 0RP. Parking is limited, we request that runners car share where possible. The car park will close at 7.15 so that we can gather the runners for the race brief which will take place at the entrance to the car park.
postRaceVenue: Kirkham and Wesham Cricket Club, Wellington Street, Kirkham, PR4 2JN
